cases.description: HANDOFF mode: context near limit produces markdown file + copy-paste block
cases.prompt: we're approaching the context limit. prepare a handoff for the next session
expectations: Reads git log, git status, and MEMORY.md if available
Prints the same content to stdout in a fenced block for copy-paste

cases.description: HANDOFF mode: handing off to another developer
cases.prompt: I need to hand this off to another developer. create a handoff document
expectations: Writes docs/sessions/YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS_handoff.md with current state and next steps
Documents files modified and known gotchas

cases.description: HANDOFF mode: /codi-session-handoff slash activates the skill
expectations: Produces the handoff markdown file in docs/sessions/

cases.description: LOG mode: end-of-day summary appended to today's log file
cases.prompt: let's wrap up — log today's work
expectations: If file exists, appends a new ## Session block instead of overwriting
Mentions decisions, PRs, and files touched this session

cases.description: LOG mode: /close_day triggers the close-day flow
expectations: Produces a structured summary with Done / Decisions / Next sections

cases.description: RESUME mode: pick-up-where-we-left-off reads latest session files
cases.prompt: what were we working on yesterday? catch me up
expectations: Reads the latest 3-5 markdown files in docs/sessions/
Produces a verbal recap of the most recent work
Does NOT write a new file in this mode

cases.description: Recovering from repeated mistakes should NOT trigger session-log
cases.prompt: I'm stuck in a loop. help me recover and get back on track

cases.description: Writing a commit message does NOT trigger session-log
cases.prompt: write a commit message for the auth changes

cases.description: Architecture decision record does NOT trigger session-log
cases.prompt: write an ADR for the database sharding decision
